sources.authority: DHMZ — Državni hidrometeorološki zavod (Croatian Meteorological and Hydrological Service)
sources.notes: DHMZ official weather warnings portal (English) covering wind, thunderstorm, heat, rain, snow-ice and other hazards with color-coded alert levels for Croatia.

sources.authority: DHMZ — Croatian Meteorological and Hydrological Service
sources.notes: DHMZ hydrological data portal: water-level (vodostaj) observations and the daily hydrological bulletin for Croatian rivers, plus river water temperatures. Primary source for flood/water monitoring.

sources.authority: DHMZ — Croatian Meteorological and Hydrological Service (Air Quality)
sources.notes: DHMZ air-quality portal (English) with current ambient pollutant concentrations (PM10, PM2.5, NO2, O3, SO2, CO) from the Croatian monitoring network.
DHMZ Adriatic (Jadran) marine forecast for small crafts: wind, sea state, visibility and isolated-thunderstorm risk across the North/Central/South Adriatic. Updated multiple times daily.

FDSNWS earthquake event query bounded to the Croatian landmass/bathymetric bbox. Returns recent events with magnitude, depth, time and location. Pan-European; bbox scopes it to Croatia (fallback for the University of Zagreb seismology service).
Meteoalarm pan-European severe-weather warning page for Croatia, sourced from DHMZ. Color-coded alert levels for all meteorological hazard types. (Machine-readable EDR GeoJSON requires an API key.)

Croatian Waters water-level monitoring application (vodostaji). Real-time gauge readings and flood-defense status for rivers and reservoirs across Croatia; also available as iOS/Android apps and a public web map.
EEA Discodata public SQL API over the AirQuality table. Filter by CountryCode='HR' for Croatian ambient air-pollution measurements reported under AQ eReporting.

Energy-Charts public API exposing Croatian electricity market and generation data (day-ahead prices, load, public power by source). No API key required; complements ENTSO-E Transparency for Croatian grid monitoring.

sources.authority: DHMZ — Državni hidrometeorološki zavod (Croatian Meteorological and Hydrological Service)
sources.notes: DHMZ official CAP (Common Alerting Protocol) weather warnings for Croatia — today's alerts. Also available: cap_hr_tomorrow.xml, cap_hr_day_after_tomorrow.xml. Covers wind, thunderstorm, heat, rain, snow/ice, coastal event and other hazards with color-coded alert levels. Confirmed 200 text/xml.

sources.authority: DHMZ — Croatian Meteorological and Hydrological Service
sources.notes: DHMZ current weather observations for all Croatian stations (alphabetical). Temperature, humidity, pressure, wind, precipitation, weather phenomenon and more. Updated hourly. Confirmed 200 text/xml.

sources.authority: DHMZ — Croatian Meteorological and Hydrological Service
sources.notes: DHMZ weather forecast for Croatia (today) in XML format. Also available: prognoza_sutra.xml (tomorrow), regije_danas.xml (by region), prognoza_izgledi.xml (3-day outlook). Confirmed 200 text/xml.

sources.authority: DHMZ — Croatian Meteorological and Hydrological Service
sources.notes: DHMZ heat wave warnings (toplinski val) for Croatia — 5-day heat hazard forecast with temperature thresholds and alert levels. Confirmed 200 text/xml.

sources.authority: DHMZ — Croatian Meteorological and Hydrological Service
sources.notes: DHMZ cold wave warnings (hladni val) for Croatia — low-temperature hazard forecast. Confirmed 200 text/xml.
Meteoalarm machine-readable CAP-derived JSON warnings feed for Croatia. Covers all hazard types with EMMA region codes, bilingual (hr/en), color-coded severity. Confirmed 200 application/json.
